license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.4pmgvk6
title: Phenol-Chloroform Extraction for dsRNA Purification
author: Cera Fisher

steps_raw.instruction: Add 166.6 uL of nuclease free water to each PCR tube. Move 187 uL of liquid to new, labeled 1.5 mL microcentrifuge tube.
Add 200 uL of acid phenol/chloroform (50:50) to each tube. Shake vigorously for 15 seconds.
Centrifuge at 4C for 5 minutes at 12,000 * g or greater
Move aqueous phase (top) to new tube (about 200 uL).
Add an equal volume chloroform to the aqueous phase. Shake vigorously for 15 seconds.
Centrifuge at 4C for 5 minutes at 12,000 * g or greater
Move aqueous phase (top) to new tube
Add an equal volume of isopropanol.
Incubate at room temperature for 10 minutes
To pellet: Spin at 4C for 20 minutes at 12,000 * g or greater
Remove isopropanol and Wash pellet with 75% ethanol in nuclease free water
Spin at 4C for 5 minutes at 7,500 * g
Remove all ethanol from pellet and let air dry (for about 15 minutes)
Resuspend dried pellet in 50 uL of nuclease free water.
Heat resuspended dsRNA to between 65 and 80 degrees C for 5 minutes
Allow to cool at room temperature for 10 minutes
Add 13.33 uL of ammonium acetate to each tube.
